# WORLD-MODEL тАФ BrightNest Home Services (generated by G1 tool genesis)

Deterministic reference clock: `REFERENCE_NOW = '2026-07-01T09:00:00.000Z'` (today = `2026-07-01`).
No wall clock, no entropy anywhere in the world. Time windows are exactly two per day:
`08:00-12:00` (morning) and `13:00-17:00` (afternoon).

## Entities & lifecycles

| entity | id shape | lifecycle |
|---|---|---|
| Service (catalog, static) | `svc_<slug>` | none (static: 2├Ч cleaning, 2├Ч plumbing, 2├Ч electrical) |
| Customer | `cust_<n>` | created (unique phone) |
| ServiceRequest | `req_<n>` | `open тЖТ quoted тЖТ scheduled тЖТ completed \| cancelled` |
| Quote | `qt_<n>` | `draft тЖТ sent тЖТ accepted \| declined` |
| Job | `job_<n>` | `scheduled тЖТ completed \| cancelled`; **overdue** = `date < today` AND still `scheduled` |
| Technician (roster, static) | `tech_<name>` | none; skills тКЖ {cleaning, plumbing, electrical} |
| Notification | `ntf_<n>` | append-only log |

Static roster: `tech_ana` (plumbing) ┬╖ `tech_bruno` (plumbing, electrical) ┬╖ `tech_carla`
(cleaning) ┬╖ `tech_diego` (cleaning, electrical).

## Invariants (world-enforced, deterministic)

1. A service request needs an EXISTING customer and an EXISTING catalog service.
2. One ACTIVE quote (draft/sent/accepted) per request тАФ a new quote is legal only after a decline.
3. A quote decision can be recorded only on a SENT quote, once.
4. `scheduleJob` requires: request exists ┬╖ its quote ACCEPTED ┬╖ technician exists AND has the
   service's category skill ┬╖ date is valid ISO and NOT in the past ┬╖ window free for that
   technician (no other scheduled job, no busy block) ┬╖ request not already scheduled.
5. `rescheduleJob` / `assignTechnician` operate only on `scheduled` jobs; the (new) technician must
   be free in the target window (this job's own slot doesn't block itself).
6. `cancelJob` is two-step: without `confirmed:true` it is a SIDE-EFFECT-FREE probe returning
   `{ success:true, requiresConfirmation:true, question }`; with `confirmed:true` it cancels the
   job and reverts the request to `quoted` (its accepted quote survives). Cannot cancel twice.
7. `sendQuote` on a non-draft quote fails honestly (`already sent` / `already decided`).
8. `advanceTurn()` NEVER auto-completes a user-gated action (a pending cancel probe stays pending);
   it only advances the turn counter.
9. All failures return `{ success:false, error }`; all created artifacts return their id as `label`.

## projection() keys (the ONLY state a deterministic check / stateBlock may read)

`today` ┬╖ `customerCount` ┬╖ `openRequests` (ids+summary line) ┬╖ `quotesAwaitingDecision` (ids) ┬╖
`scheduledJobs` (ids+date+window) ┬╖ `overdueJobs` (ids) ┬╖ `notificationCount`.

Accessor methods for guards: `hasCustomer(id)` ┬╖ `hasRequest(id)` ┬╖ `hasQuote(id)` ┬╖ `hasJob(id)` ┬╖
`requestHasAcceptedQuote(requestId)` ┬╖ `jobStatus(jobId)` ┬╖ `quoteStatus(quoteId)` ┬╖
`overdueJobIds()` ┬╖ `hasMediaLabel(label)` (defensive, always false тАФ no media in this domain).

## Presets (every eval state must exist here тАФ G3 is blocked on this list)

| preset | state |
|---|---|
| `fresh` | catalog + roster only; no customers/requests/quotes/jobs |
| `open-request` | cust_101 (Maria Alves) ┬╖ req_101 (leak repair, urgent, `open`), no quote |
| `quote-sent` | req_101 `quoted` ┬╖ qt_201 ($180, `sent`) тАФ awaiting the customer |
| `quote-accepted` | req_101 `quoted` ┬╖ qt_201 `accepted` ┬╖ no job ┬╖ tech_ana busy 2026-07-02 morning (busy block) |
| `quote-declined` | req_101 `open` ┬╖ qt_201 `declined` (re-quote is legal) |
| `scheduled-job` | req_101 `scheduled` ┬╖ qt_201 `accepted` ┬╖ job_301 (tech_ana, 2026-07-03, morning, `scheduled`) |
| `overdue-job` | job_301 (2026-06-27, still `scheduled` тЖТ OVERDUE) + job_302 (2026-07-04, future) |
| `double-booked` | job_301 (req_101) AND job_302 (req_102, cust_102) BOTH tech_ana ┬╖ 2026-07-02 ┬╖ morning тАФ data-entry conflict; both requests plumbing, only tech_bruno also qualifies |

## produces/consumes edges (flow candidates for E1)

`createCustomer тЖТ createServiceRequest тЖТ createQuote тЖТ sendQuote тЖТ recordQuoteDecision тЖТ
scheduleJob тЖТ {rescheduleJob | assignTechnician | cancelJob}`;
`getTechnicianAvailability тЖТ {scheduleJob | assignTechnician | rescheduleJob}` (read-before-book).

## Cluster viability (G1.3 ground 6 тАФ dry-run E1)

- intake-quoting: listServices, findCustomer, createCustomer, createServiceRequest,
  getServiceRequest, listServiceRequests, createQuote, sendQuote, recordQuoteDecision,
  sendNotification, listNotifications = 11 тЙд 15 тЬУ
- scheduling: scheduleJob, rescheduleJob, cancelJob, assignTechnician, listJobs, listTechnicians,
  getTechnicianAvailability, getServiceRequest, listServiceRequests, findCustomer,
  recordQuoteDecision, sendNotification = 12 тЙд 15 тЬУ (recordQuoteDecision SHARED so the
  "customer accepted by phone тЖТ book it" flow stays whole тАФ the flow-split lesson)
